hero.headline:
Sri Lankan voices.
Australian home.
hero.subline: Trusted news, current affairs, drama and music for the Sri Lankan diaspora — broadcasting live from Melbourne to the world.

community.title: Vishvavahini is yours
community.body: As a community-owned channel we rely on viewers, sponsors and advertisers to stay on air. Help us tell Sri Lankan stories from Australian soil.

watch.checkBack: Check back soon or browse our programmes for on-demand content.

radio.title: VishTV Radio
radio.subtitle: Sri Lankan community radio broadcasting from Melbourne. Music, talk shows and live coverage — listen anywhere.
radio.offlineHint: Check back soon or watch our TV programmes instead.
radio.goLiveIntro: Broadcast to VishTV Radio straight from your browser — no software to install. Sign in with your presenter login on the broadcaster page.
radio.goLiveNote: Works best on a desktop browser (Chrome, Firefox or Edge) with a stable internet connection. When you disconnect, the station returns to the automated playlist automatically.
radio.goLiveFallback: Prefer desktop software? You can also broadcast with free apps like Mixxx or BUTT pointed at the station server.
radio.goLiveNotReady: Live browser broadcasting isn't switched on yet. This page will activate once the station's Web DJ is set up.

footer.description: Community television for the Sri Lankan diaspora in Australia. Broadcasting from Melbourne.
